docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT VILLANUEVA, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST RESET FOR 7/12,130PM,BUT DATE CONT'D BY COURT TO 8/2;MADE COPIES FOR SRVC.
